faqItems.question: Why release a beta version?
faqItems.answer:
We consider user feedback essential to improving product quality.
By opening early access on macOS, we aim to collect real-world usage insights and continuously refine features and user experience.

faqItems.question: When will the official version be released?
faqItems.answer:
The product is under active development and optimization.
The release timeline will be determined based on beta feedback and development progress. The beta period may be extended if necessary.

faqItems.question: How do I link a Steam account?
faqItems.answer:
After launching the client:
Click the profile icon in the top-right corner to open the account panel.
For first-time linking, select Sign in to Steam and authenticate via credentials or QR code.
To add additional accounts, go to Account Center → Steam Account Management → Add Account and authenticate using credentials or QR code.
boldTexts: Account Center → Steam Account Management → Add Account

faqItems.question: How do I import game files?
faqItems.answer:
Three import methods are supported:
1. Manual import: Click Import Game from the sidebar or library, then select an .exe file or scan a folder.
2. Drag and drop: Drag an .exe file directly into the client.
3. Direct execution: Double-click an .exe file on your device.
After import, the system automatically parses game metadata. You can edit the game cover, title, and description.
If the game does not appear, click the Refresh button in the top navigation bar.

faqItems.question: How do I configure emulator compatibility settings?
faqItems.answer:
Pre-configured compatibility profiles are available for selected games. Launching the game applies the default configuration.
Advanced users can customize emulator containers and dependencies via Win Emulator Settings.
faqItems.linkText: the list of games with dedicated profiles (continuously updated)

faqItems.question: How to contact the GameHub team?
faqItems.answer: To facilitate in-depth communication with players, we've set up a QQ group (Group ID: 1079246543) for this beta, providing beta download guides, Q&A support, and feedback collection. We've also set up an official WeChat account where we'll share more GameHub news and updates. Welcome to join or follow us!
